markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Streamline the content publishing cadence and align on year-end deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**"Calibration" article approved for immediate publishing.** N-able will handle CMS upload; GrowthX will investigate providing HTML to accelerate the process.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**To unblock the pipeline, Elaine will begin editorial reviews in parallel with security reviews.** This addresses security as the primary bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [**GrowthX will deliver 10 new articles by year-end** (3 this week, 5 next) to create a backlog for Q1 publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [**GrowthX will investigate adding infographics to its services.** This is a new request from N-able to support the "Attack Resilience" content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)

## Topics

### Content Review & Publishing Process

  - [**Problem:** The security team's review is the primary bottleneck, delaying publishing and preventing performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [**Solution:** Elaine will begin editorial reviews in parallel with security reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The content is SEO-focused, so editorial changes are minimal and do not depend on security feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [**Internal Action:** Nicholas and Andrew will meet with the VP of Product Marketing tomorrow to streamline the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [**Goal:** Accelerate security reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [**Update:** Nicholas will share outcomes after the new year.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [**"Calibration" Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Approved for publishing after Elaine's feedback was incorporated.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [N-able will handle CMS upload.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Improvement:** Andrew suggested GrowthX provide HTML versions to accelerate the handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
          - [**Action:** Matt will investigate this capability.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)

### Content Pipeline & Deliverables

  - [**GrowthX Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [**This Week:** 3 articles (N-Central, Cove, a multiple-product piece).](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [**Next Week:** 5 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
      - [**Total by EOY:** 10 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Clarification:**](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [**GrowthX Focus:** Thought leadership to drive ICP traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [**N-able Focus:** "What is" content for the internal "Cyber Encyclopedia" project.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [**Gated Asset:**](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
      - [The outline is ready for PMM review.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
      - [**Product Focus:** AdLumen is the primary focus, with light mentions of other products to show the full stack.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [**Action:** Elaine to review the outline and product messaging before it is sent to PMM.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

### New Request: Infographics

  - [**Request:** N-able asked if GrowthX can create infographics for the "Attack Resilience" content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [**Status:** Matt will investigate; "soft yes" is the initial response.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)

### Holiday Schedule

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [**Quiet Week:** Dec 29–Jan 2 (company-wide).](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [**Matt OOO:** Dec 21–Jan 2.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [**Support:** Ada will manage handoffs and direct questions to the team.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [**N-able:**](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
      - [**Elaine OOO:** Starting Dec 17.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
      - [**Andrew & Nicholas:** Will be available.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
      - [**PMM:** Availability is unknown.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Mark "Calibration" article as review complete in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Investigate providing HTML versions for content handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Confirm infographic capabilities and inform Elaine.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [**Elaine:**](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Publish the "Calibration" article.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Begin editorial review of the "Security" article.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
      - [Review the gated asset outline and product messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
      - [Create and send the "Attack Resilience" topic document.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [**Nicholas & Andrew:**](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [Meet with the VP of Product Marketing to streamline the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/op4shh_spHiwZDAEHz7sD5mG2KWvykEi?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
